acceptance_blockers: Concrete when2heat.csv checksum is not selected.
Shared weather contract path remains unresolved until PI/maintainer action.
Real paired-weather cold-spell sanity evidence is not available.

datapackage.description: OPSD frictionless data package metadata for When2Heat.

zip.description: Complete OPSD When2Heat data package archive.
zip.expected_size_note: large archive; OPSD page lists about 497 MB

checksum_workflow: Request normal network approval before any real download.
Run data/get_when2heat.py --download csv --resume so the file streams into data/raw/when2heat/when2heat.csv.tmp.
Persist download checkpoint metadata under data/metadata/when2heat while streaming.
Compute SHA-256 after completion and atomically replace data/raw/when2heat/when2heat.csv.
Update DATA_REGISTER D-003 only after a concrete local file/version/checksum is selected for PI review.

runtime_assessment.note: The primary CSV is listed as 313 MB. Retrieval is not inherently a >15 minute process on a stable connection above about 3 Mbps, but Agent C must send a long-run notice before launch if a pilot, current network conditions, or mirror choice estimate runtime above 15 minutes. The 497 MB zip is not the proposed primary file.

selected_file.description: Single-index hourly When2Heat heat-demand and COP time series.
selected_file.expected_size_note: large profile file; OPSD page lists about 313 MB

status: proposed source-selection workflow; no download performed, no checksum selected, and PI sign-off pending
why_selected: Single-index CSV is directly compatible with the E2.S3 loader.
It contains the hourly heat_profile, heat_demand, and COP columns needed for NL HP profiles.
It is the smallest OPSD-listed complete tabular file for this loader; the zip/archive is not required.
